Thought for 3s

Indianapolis, IN — Current Weather Update (as of ~12 PM EDT):
59°F, Partly Cloudy to Cloudy. Feels like 54°F.
Winds SW 14 mph. Humidity ~40%.

Isolated showers possible this afternoon (15-30% chance) — low rain risk. No strong wind concerns. High today near 61-63°F.
